headline: NFL fifth-year option tracker: 2023 first-round draft class
description: The deadline for teams to pick up the fifth-year option on rookie contracts is Friday. Which players have had their options picked up?

headline: Ravens sign undrafted QBs Diego Pavia, Joe Fagnano before minicamp
description: The Ravens signed undrafted quarterbacks Diego Pavia and Joe Fagnano ahead of the team's scheduled rookie minicamp this weekend.

headline: Rams GM Les Snead clears up confusion about meeting with Ty Simpson
description: Rams general manager Les Snead joins “The Pat McAfee Show” to discuss the team meeting with Ty Simpson leading up to the draft.

headline: Steelers place seldom-used UFA tender on Aaron Rodgers
description: The Steelers placed the seldom-used UFA tender on quarterback Aaron Rodgers on Tuesday, which preserves Pittsburgh's right to receive a compensatory draft pick in the event that Rodgers signs with another team before July 22.

headline: Schefter not convinced Simpson would have been 1st-rounder if not for Rams
description: Adam Schefter reflects on the Rams selecting Ty Simpson with the 13th pick in the NFL draft.

headline: 2026 fantasy football draft rankings: PPR leagues
description: Fantasy football rankings for the upcoming season, for PPR leagues, as well as IDP and dynasty setups.

headline: Fantasy football winners and losers after the NFL draft: Jadarian Price, A.J. Brown, James Conner and more
description: Which players benefited most from the happenings during draft weekend, and which saw their stocks fall the most.

headline: Can the Rams' Ty Simpson, Matthew Stafford approach work?
description: Matthew Stafford just won MVP, but the contending Rams still drafted Ty Simpson in Round 1. Is it bad team building, or are there precedents for this working?

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Yates' five favorite picks in every round
description: Omar Cooper Jr. at No. 30? R Mason Thomas in Round 2? Cole Payton on Day 3? Field Yates has the best picks in every round.

headline: Vikings' draft fallout from Banks pick to Greenard trade
description: Why the salary cap, coaches and interim GM hovered over the Vikings' decisions throughout the NFL draft.

headline: Ty Simpson: Had secret meeting with Rams' McVay before draft
description: Newly drafted QB Ty Simpson said in an ESPN Radio interview that he kept his meeting with coach Sean McVay "private" in accordance with the Rams' wishes.

headline: Prospect X is drafted; identity is revealed
description: ESPN's Kalyn Kahler set out to find the most overlooked player in the NFL draft, better known as Prospect X. His identity is now revealed and he's headed to Jacksonville.

headline: NFL draft 1st round averages 13.2M viewers, down from last year
description: The first round of the NFL draft averaged 13.2 million viewers across television and digital platforms, making it the third-most watched first round on record, behind 2020's audience of 15.5 million and last year's 13.6 million.
